title: Bitter Crisp Australian Glace Cherry Slice
description: A light and crisp dessert featuring glace cherries that are lightly grilled and paired with a sweet yet subtle cherry glaze for an irresistible treat.
instructions: Gently warm the glace cherries in a microwave for about 20 seconds. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Grill each cherry lightly for about 2-3 minutes or until just slightly charred and softened, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
While the cherries are grilling, mix together the sugar-free glaze mix with the light syrup in a small bowl. Whisk gently to combine but avoid overmixing as it could create lumps.
Once the cherries are cooled slightly, spoon the glaze mixture evenly on top of each cherry.
Allow the slices to rest for about 5 minutes before serving.
